title: GMCH Chandigarh Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 100 Senior Resident and Other Posts
description: Government Medical College and Hospital (GMCH), Chandigarh, has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the 100 Senior Resident, Medical Officer, Resident Anaesthetist, Resident Pathology Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the MD/ MS, DNB, and Post-Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the GMCH Chandigarh Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts...
